task: Find the tech specs of the MacBook Pro 16-inch introduced in November 2023.
final_result_response:
I now have all the complete tech specs for the MacBook Pro 16-inch introduced in November 2023. Here is a comprehensive summary:

---

## 🖥️ MacBook Pro (16-inch, November 2023) — Tech Specs

**Source:** [Apple Support – https://support.apple.com/en-us/117737](https://support.apple.com/en-us/117737)
**Year Introduced:** 2023

---

### 🎨 Finish
- Space Black
- Silver

---

### ⚙️ Chip

**Apple M3 Pro:**
- 12-core CPU (6 performance + 6 efficiency cores)
- 18-core GPU
- Hardware-accelerated ray tracing
- 16-core Neural Engine
- 150 GB/s memory bandwidth
- Media Engine: H.264, HEVC, ProRes, ProRes RAW, AV1 decode
- Configurable to: M3 Max (14-core CPU / 30-core GPU or 16-core CPU / 40-core GPU)

**Apple M3 Max:**
- 14-core or 16-core CPU
- 30-core or 40-core GPU
- Hardware-accelerated ray tracing
- 16-core Neural Engine
- 300 GB/s memory bandwidth (400 GB/s with 16-core CPU)
- Media Engine: Two video encode engines, Two ProRes encode/decode engines, AV1 decode

---

### 💾 Memory
- **M3 Pro:** 18GB unified memory (configurable to 36GB, 96GB)
- **M3 Max:** 36GB unified memory (configurable to 48GB, 64GB, 96GB, 128GB)

---

### 💿 Storage
- **M3 Pro:** 512GB SSD (configurable to 1TB, 2TB, 4TB; 8TB for M3 Max only)
- **M3 Max:** 1TB SSD (configurable to 2TB, 4TB, 8TB)

---

### 🖥️ Display
- **Liquid Retina XDR display**
- 16.2-inch diagonal
- 3456 × 2234 native resolution at 254 ppi
- XDR (Extreme Dynamic Range): 1,000,000:1 contrast ratio
- 1000 nits sustained full-screen brightness; 1600 nits peak (HDR)
- SDR brightness: 600 nits
- 1 billion colors, Wide color (P3), True Tone
- ProMotion: adaptive refresh up to 120Hz
- Fixed refresh rates: 47.95Hz, 48Hz, 50Hz, 59.94Hz, 60Hz

---

### 🔋 Battery & Power
- Up to **22 hours** Apple TV app movie playback
- Up to **15 hours** wireless web
- 100-watt-hour lithium-polymer battery (actual: 99.6 Wh)
- **140W USB-C Power Adapter** + USB-C to MagSafe 3 Cable included
- Fast-charge capable with included 140W adapter

---

### 🔌 Charging & Expansion
- MagSafe 3 port
- **Three Thunderbolt 4 (USB-C) ports** — Charging, DisplayPort, Thunderbolt 4 (40Gb/s), USB 4 (40Gb/s)
- SDXC card slot
- HDMI port
- 3.5 mm headphone jack (with high-impedance headphone support)

---

### 🖥️ External Display Support
- **M3 Pro:** Up to 2 external displays (up to 6K@60Hz over Thunderbolt, or 8K@60Hz / 4K@240Hz over HDMI)
- **M3 Max:** Up to 4 external displays (up to three 6K@60Hz over Thunderbolt + one 4K@144Hz over HDMI)

---

### 📷 Camera
- 1080p FaceTime HD camera
- Advanced image signal processor with computational video

---

### 🔊 Audio
- High-fidelity **six-speaker** sound system with force-cancelling woofers
- Wide stereo sound, Spatial Audio (Dolby Atmos), dynamic head tracking with AirPods
- Studio-quality three-mic array with directional beamforming
- HDMI port supports multichannel audio output

---

### 📡 Wireless
- **Wi-Fi 6E** (802.11ax)
- **Bluetooth 5.3**

---

### ⌨️ Keyboard & Trackpad
- Backlit Magic Keyboard: 78 (US) / 79 (ISO) keys, 12 full-height function keys
- Touch ID, Ambient light sensor
- Force Touch trackpad

---

### 📐 Size & Weight
- **Height:** 0.66 in (1.68 cm)
- **Width:** 14.01 in (35.57 cm)
- **Depth:** 9.77 in (24.81 cm)
- **Weight (M3 Pro):** 4.7 lbs (2.14 kg)
- **Weight (M3 Max):** 4.8 lbs (2.16 kg)

---

### 🌡️ Operating Requirements
- Voltage: 100V–240V AC, 50–60Hz
- Operating temp: 50°–95°F (10°–35°C)
- Storage temp: –13°–113°F (–25°–45°C)
- Humidity: 0–90% noncondensing
- Operating altitude: up to 10,000 ft (3,000 m)

---

### 📦 In the Box
- 16-inch MacBook Pro
- 140W USB-C Power Adapter
- USB-C to MagSafe 3 Cable (2 m)

---

### 💻 Operating System
- **macOS** (currently macOS Sequoia)

Here are the complete tech specs for the **MacBook Pro (16-inch, November 2023)** as found on Apple Support (https://support.apple.com/en-us/117737):

---

**Finish:** Space Black, Silver

**Chip:**
- Apple M3 Pro: 12-core CPU (6 performance + 6 efficiency), 18-core GPU, 16-core Neural Engine, 150 GB/s memory bandwidth, Media Engine
- Apple M3 Max: 14-core or 16-core CPU, 30-core or 40-core GPU, 16-core Neural Engine, 300–400 GB/s memory bandwidth, 2× encode engines

**Memory:**
- M3 Pro: 18GB (configurable to 36GB or 96GB)
- M3 Max: 36GB (configurable to 48GB, 64GB, 96GB, 128GB)

**Storage:**
- M3 Pro: 512GB SSD (up to 4TB; 8TB with M3 Max)
- M3 Max: 1TB SSD (up to 8TB)

**Display:** 16.2-inch Liquid Retina XDR, 3456×2234 @ 254ppi, 1000 nits sustained / 1600 nits peak HDR, 600 nits SDR, ProMotion up to 120Hz, True Tone, P3 wide color

**Battery:** Up to 22 hrs video playback / 15 hrs wireless web; 100Wh battery; 140W USB-C Power Adapter

**Ports:** MagSafe 3, 3× Thunderbolt 4 (USB-C, up to 40Gb/s), HDMI, SDXC, 3.5mm headphone jack

**Wireless:** Wi-Fi 6E (802.11ax), Bluetooth 5.3

**Camera:** 1080p FaceTime HD

**Audio:** Six-speaker system with force-cancelling woofers, Spatial Audio (Dolby Atmos), three-mic array

**Keyboard:** Backlit Magic Keyboard with Touch ID, Force Touch trackpad

**Size & Weight:**
- 0.66 × 14.01 × 9.77 inches (1.68 × 35.57 × 24.81 cm)
- M3 Pro: 4.7 lbs (2.14 kg) | M3 Max: 4.8 lbs (2.16 kg)

**OS:** macOS (Sequoia)
